payment_terms: Base rent payable monthly in advance at rates ranging from $22.00 to $24.00 per rentable square foot annually, plus an electrical inclusion charge of $2.75 per rentable square foot per annum, plus tenant's proportionate share of operating expense increases and tax increases above base year amounts.
termination_clauses: Tenant default in payment of rent with 10 days' notice to cure
Tenant default in other lease obligations with 30 days' notice to cure
Demised premises become vacant or deserted
Death or permanent disability of any natural person liable on guaranty
Execution or attachment issued against tenant not bonded or dismissed within reasonable time
Landlord may terminate if building damaged in last 12 months of term
Landlord may terminate if demised premises rendered substantially untenantable by casualty
Landlord may terminate if building substantially damaged requiring restoration
Tenant bankruptcy, insolvency, or appointment of receiver not vacated within 90 days
Landlord may terminate lease with respect to portion proposed for subletting if tenant seeks to sublease less than substantially all premises
Landlord may terminate entire lease if tenant seeks to assign or sublease substantially all premises
Termination upon eminent domain taking of whole or material part of demised premises
Landlord may elect to terminate if portion of building other than demised premises is taken by eminent domain
